description_html:
AlgoXchange is a competitive coding contest conducted over two rounds. Teams use an initial pool of points to unlock coding problems, solve them for profit, and make real-time decisions to maximize their net balance. The event emphasizes problem-solving skills, time management, and strategic planning.

Event Format

  • The competition will be conducted in two rounds, where team performance and accumulated points determine final rankings.

Round 1: 

  • Each team starts with 1000 points as their initial balance.
  • A list of coding problems will be available with:
  • Difficulty level
  • Unlock cost
  • Profit value
  • Estimated solving time
  • Teams must spend points to unlock problems.
  • Upon correct solution verification, profits are added to the team’s balance.
  • No eliminations take place in this round.
  • Team balances carry forward to Round 2.

Round 2:

  • Teams continue solving problems using their remaining balance.

  • Strategic decision-making and time efficiency play a crucial role.

  • Final rankings are determined based on total net balance.

Problem Categories

Difficulty Levels:

Difficulty: Easy

  • Cost: 100
  • Profit: 150
  • Estimated Time: 10 minutes

Difficulty: Medium

  • Cost: 250
  • Profit: 400
  • Estimated Time: 20 minutes

Difficulty: Hard

  • Cost: 400
  • Profit: 750
  • Estimated Time: 30 minutes

Rules & Guidelines:

  • Solutions will be verified by moderators before awarding profits.
  • Incorrect submissions will not receive points.
  • All problem purchases are final once recorded.
  • Any unfair practices or use of unauthorized assistance may lead to disqualification.
  • The decision of the organizing committee will be final.

Evaluation Criteria:

  • Teams will be ranked based on:
  • Final net balance at the end of the contest
  • Time efficiency 
  • Number of correctly solved problems

Skills Tested:

  • Algorithmic Thinking
  • Competitive Programming
  • Strategic Decision Making
  • Time Management
  • Team Collaboration
location: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing, Kancheepuram
